meaning: International Telecommunications Union,国际电信联盟
examples: The ITU launched its Internet Training Center program in two thousand one.
The ITU expects far more bandwidth to become available in the next two years.
The International Telecommunications Union (ITU) recommends a maximum 150-millisecond one-way end-to-end delay.
The ITU, gentle readers, has operated largely in obscurity for the last 150 plus years.
Other countries want to give a UN agency, the International Telecommunication Union (ITU), a supervisory role.
